arts.ttl: Man City boss Gareth Taylor responds to Chloe Kelly fall-out rumours
arts.sum: When asked about the rumours on Tuesday ahead of City’s Champions League clash against Austrian side St. Polten, Taylor described the story as a "non-event" and insisted Kelly is aligned with all they are doing at City and understands the intense competition for places at the top end of the pitch. Manchester City manager Gareth Taylor has described reports of a fall-out with England star Chloe Kelly as a "non-event".

arts.ttl: Parker earns England recall as James and Wubben-Moy return
arts.sum: Aston Villa defender Lucy Parker has earned a Lionesses recall as Lauren James and Lotte Wubben-Moy both return for international friendly fixtures against Germany and South Africa later this month.
